What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a grey pullover with white logos stands behind a white kitchen counter. He holds brown eggs and cracks them into a white square bowl placed in front of him. A white cylindrical container with a green label sits on the counter to the right of the bowl. White text reading 'Healthy Brownies' is displayed at the bottom of the screen. Silver kitchen appliances are visible in the background.

question: Which of the previously seen objects is back on screen? A. <grey egg carton containing brown eggs> B. <white cylindrical container with a green label> C. <black frying pan> D. <silver electric kettle>

What action is the person wearing a black long-sleeved garment performing? A. scooping B. stirring C. speaking
Describe the sequence of actions the person performs with the eggs and container from the beginning of the clip until the eggs are in the bowl.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the man wearing grey pullover holds a white container with a green label; at 8s, the man holds two brown eggs over the counter; at 10s, the man begins cracking an egg shell with his thumbs over a white bowl; at 12s, the egg yolk and white fall into the bowl; at 16s, the man separates the broken eggshell halves while two yolks sit in the bowl.
